description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a dark exterior siding and a prominent sloped shed roof. The front features a large garage with two doors, while the rear showcases a spacious wooden deck and an exterior staircase leading to the upper level. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a mix of large and small rectangular panes, including a set of tall windows that provide ample natural light. The deck is supported by wooden posts and enclosed with metal railings, adding to the contemporary aesthetic. The house sits on a grassy plot with concrete stepping stones leading to the entryway. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor space, and a minimalist approach.
description: A modern two-story house with a sloped shed roof, dark siding, large garage, and a rear wooden deck with metal railings and exterior stairs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tall, dark siding wall and the sloped shed roof, with the wooden deck and metal railings visible on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wooden deck, exterior staircase, multiple windows, and the grassy backyard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the sloped roof and dark siding, showing the deck and stairs extending from the left.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the large double garage doors, concrete driveway, and the clean, minimalist facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry via a large garage with double doors and a concrete driveway; rear entry features a wooden deck, exterior stairs, and metal railings.
